comment.body:
This initiate my base suspections of China will fold first, not the US.
This is a common misinterpretation. US never intended to fold, and I never said that. In fact I always emphatized that it was Xi who wanted to negotiate at the beginning, but when he saw that Trump risks too much he went towards extrems, to signal strenght and to mess with investors sentiment about US. 
I only said that US has much more to lose, but it can bear much more than China, and this is a very risky game for Trump. Nobody can exactly know whats gonna happen, I was talking about odds. 
Read back my posts. 
Trump tone shift is simply to negotiate with countries, it is not a sign of weakness it is a sign of Trump starts to grow up… lol,

Witkoff is in Kremlin. Trump still hopes that they can get ceasefire until May 9.
As said, the ultimatum, US gave for the EU during the London summit is primarly to press them even more. They need US, they have to see. Bluffing. Even through future acts.
